name: @tootallnate/bnvib
description: Parser for Nintendo Switch BNVIB files — the binary HD Rumble vibration patterns shipped in first-party games (Mario Kart 8 Deluxe, Splatoon, etc.). Decodes the per-band amplitude / frequency stream into a waveform you can visualise or render as audio.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
